params.initialMessage:
Each pio capability should declare which GoalState fields it reads and which marker files it produces. This enables compatibility analysis: verifying capabilities only read state that previous capabilities in the chain have produced, and detecting contracts that would break if a new capability is inserted mid-pipeline.

This builds on the elevate-transition-state-machine work (src/goal-state.ts, src/state-machine.ts). Each capability's CAPABILITY_CONFIG should gain optional contract declarations (reads: GoalState field list, writes: marker file list) with static or runtime validation to prove chain integrity.
